comment.comment: isn't it ironical that we are using technology to discuss the school using technology. Would have been happy if wen had gone and ask the school not to ask for signed hard copy and obtain an electronic confirmation.  ".no schools in d city shy away from it " so shouldn't we take pride that only SDB does it. We have to accept the invasion of technology in our lives and I would request all parents appreciate that SDB is taking lead in use of technology rather than shying away from it. I personally feel SDB is doing a good job on this front and we should cooperate with the school rather than ask them to go back to the old ways.
comment.author: Pawan Lohia

comment.group: ADVAITA VEDANTA - Awake - Remember your SELF

group_comments_v2.title: Pawan Lohia commented on Emily Snow's post.

comment.comment:
This is shlok 11 and 12 of chapter 12.

Out of 4 paths - karma and gyan on one side and dhyan and bhakti on other side the 1st 2 are easier to practice especially for  the logic driven people as it leads to tangible measurable impact. It is dhyan and bhakti which are difficult to practice as both require inward focus and the results are difficult to measure. Also both require control over body, mind, thoughts and emotions which are again not easy at all.
comment.author: Pawan Lohia
